description:
## Goal

Add `spec/feed_fetcher_concurrent_spec.cr` covering the public
`RefreshLoop::FeedFetcherConcurrent` API.

## Coverage

- `OVERALL_FETCH_TIMEOUT` constant value
- `#best_available_feed` priority logic (the 4 cases):
  fresh-good > stale-good > fresh-bad > stale-bad > synthetic error
- `#fetch_all` with empty input (returns empty hash, no fibers
  spawned)
- `#fetch_all` with one feed and a working semaphore (the
  end-to-end path uses `FeedFetcher.instance.fetch` which makes
  a real HTTP request — may not be hermetic, so make this an
  opt-in test guarded by an env var or a class-level skip
  flag; or document the limitation)

## Out of scope

The private helpers `fetch_one`, `fetch_one_with_timeout`,
`fallback_feed` are not directly testable without mocking
`FeedFetcher.instance` and the `SemaphorePool`. Adding that
plumbing is a bigger change; if needed, ticket can be expanded
later.

## Acceptance

- Spec file exists and follows existing conventions
- `crystal spec spec/feed_fetcher_concurrent_spec.cr` passes
- Full suite still passes (180 + 15 from semaphore_pool + new)
- `ameba` clean
- `just nix-build` succeeds
title: Add spec/feed_fetcher_concurrent_spec.cr
